name: AE_AEYN
label: Were any adverse events experienced?
question_text: Were any adverse events experienced?
hint: Indicate if the subject experienced any adverse events. If yes, include the appropriate details where indicated on the CRF.

name: AE_AESPID
label: AE Number
question_text: AE Number
hint: AE Sponsor-Defined Identifier

name: AE_AETERM
label: What is the adverse event term?
question_text: What is the adverse event term?
hint: Record only one diagnosis, sign, or symptom per line. Using accepted medical terminology, enter the diagnosis (if known); otherwise, enter a sign or symptom.

name: AE_AESTDAT
label: Start Date
question_text: Start Date
hint: Record the start date of the AE.

name: AE_AEONGO
label: Ongoing
question_text: Ongoing
hint: Indicate if the adverse event has not resolved at the time of data collection

name: AE_AEENDAT
label: End Date
question_text: End Date
hint: Record the date that the AE resolved/ended.

name: AE_AESEV
label: Severity
question_text: Severity
hint: The reporting physician/healthcare professional will assess the severity of the event using the sponsor-defined categories. Note: Severity is not equivalent to seriousness.

name: AE_AESER
label: Was the adverse event serious?
question_text: Was the adverse event serious?
hint: Assess if an adverse event should be classified as serious based on the serious criteria defined in the protocol.

name: AE_AESDTH
label: Did the adverse event result in death?
question_text: Did the adverse event result in death?
hint: Record whether the serious adverse event resulted in death.

name: AE_AESLIFE
label: Was the adverse event life threatening?
question_text: Was the adverse event life threatening?
hint: Record whether the serious adverse event is life threatening.

name: AE_AESHOSP
label: Did the adverse event result in initial or prolonged hospitalization for the subject?
question_text: Did the adverse event result in initial or prolonged hospitalization for the subject?
hint: Record whether the serious adverse event resulted in an initial or prolonged hospitalization.

name: AE_AESDISAB
label: Did the adverse event result in disability or permanent damage?
question_text: Did the adverse event result in disability or permanent damage?
hint: Record whether the SAE resulted in a persistent or significant disability or incapacity.

name: AE_AESCONG
label: Was the adverse event associated with a congenital anomaly or birth defect?
question_text: Was the adverse event associated with a congenital anomaly or birth defect?
hint: Record whether the SAE was associated with congenital anomaly or birth defect.

name: AE_AESMIE
label: Was the adverse event a medically important event not covered by other serious criteria?
question_text: Was the adverse event a medically important event not covered by other serious criteria?
hint: Record whether the SAE is an important medical event, defined by the protocol or Investigator Brochure.

name: AE_AEREL
label: Relationship to Study Treatment
question_text: Relationship to Study Treatment
hint: Indicate if the cause of the AE is related to the study treatment and cannot be reasonably explained by other factors.

name: AE_AEACN
label: Action taken with Study Treatment
question_text: Action taken with Study Treatment
hint: Record changes made to the study treatment resulting from the AE.

name: AE_AEACNOTH
label: Other Action Taken
question_text: Other Action Taken

name: AE_AEOUT
label: Outcome
question_text: Outcome
hint: Record the appropriate outcome of the event in relation to the subject's status.

name: CM_CMYN
label: Were any medications/therapies taken?
question_text: Were any medications/therapies taken?
hint: Indicate if the subject took any (concomitant) medications/therapies. If Yes, include the appropriate details where indicated on the CRF.

name: CM_CMSPID
label: CM Number
question_text: CM Number

name: CM_CMTRT
label: Medication/Therapy
question_text: What was the (concomitant) [medication/treatment/therapy] (name/term)?
hint: Record only 1 medication/therapy per line. Provide the full trade or proprietary name of the medication/therapy; otherwise the generic name may be recorded.

name: CM_CMINDC
label: Indication
question_text: For what indication was the (concomitant) [medication/treatment/therapy] taken?
hint: Record the reason the medication/therapy was taken based on clinical investigator's evaluation. If taken to treat a condition, and a diagnosis was made, the indication should be the diagnosis. If taken to treat a condition, and no diagnosis was made, the indication should be the signs and symptoms. If taken as prophylaxis, report as "Prophylaxis for" and include a description of the condition(s).

name: CM_CMDSTXT
label: Dose
question_text: What was the individual dose of the (concomitant) [medication/treatment/therapy]?
hint: Record the dose of medication/therapy taken per administration (e.g., 200).

name: CM_CMDOSU
label: Unit
question_text: What is the unit (for the dose of concomitant [medication/treatment/therapy])?
hint: Record the dose unit of the dose of concomitant medication/therapy taken (e.g., mg.).

name: CMDOSSPACER
label: .
question_text: .

name: CM_CMDOSUO
label: Other, Specify
question_text: Other, Specify

name: CM_CMDOSFRM
label: Dose Form
question_text: What was the dose form of the (concomitant) [medication/treatment/therapy]?
hint: Record the pharmaceutical dosage form (e.g., Capsule, Cream) of delivery for the concomitant medication/therapy taken.

name: CM_CMDOSFRMO
label: Other, Specify
question_text: Other, Specify

name: CM_CMDOSFRQ
label: Frequency
question_text: What was the frequency of the (concomitant) [medication/treatment/therapy]?
hint: Record how often the  medication/therapy was taken (e.g., BID, PRN).

name: CM_CMDOSFRQO
label: Dose Frequency Other, Specify
question_text: Dose Frequency Other, Specify

name: CM_CMROUTE
label: Route
question_text: What was the route of administration of the (concomitant) [medication/treatment/therapy]?
hint: Provide the route of administration for the  medication/therapy.

name: CM_CMROUTEO
label: Other, Specify
question_text: Other, Specify

name: CM_CMSTDAT
label: What was the (concomitant) [medication/medication/therapy/dose] start date?
question_text: What was the (concomitant) [medication/medication/therapy/dose] start date?
hint: Record the date the concomitant medication/therapy was first taken. If the subject has been taking the concomitant medication/therapy for a considerable amount of time prior to the start of the study, it is acceptable to have an incomplete date. Concomitant medication/therapy taken during the study are expected to have a complete start date. Prior concomitant medication/therapy that are exclusionary should have both a start and end date.

name: CM_CMSTDD
label: Start Day
question_text: What was the (concomitant) [medication/treatment/therapy/dose] start day?

name: CM_CMSTMO
label: Start Month
question_text: What was the (concomitant) [medication/treatment/therapy/dose] start month?

name: CM_CMSTYY
label: Start Year
question_text: What was the (concomitant) [medication/treatment/therapy/dose] start year?

name: CM_CMONGO
label: Ongoing
question_text: Was the (concomitant) [medication/treatment/therapy] ongoing (as of [the study-specific time point or period])?
hint: Record the concomitant medication/therapy as ongoing if the subject has not stopped taking the concomitant medication/therapy at [the timepoint defined by the study]. If the concomitant medication is ongoing, the end date should be left blank.

name: CM_CMENDAT
label: End Date
question_text: What was the (concomitant) [medication/treatment/therapy/dose] end date?
hint: Record the date the concomitant medication/therapy was stopped.

name: MH_MHYN
label: Were any medical conditions or events reported?
question_text: Were any medical conditions or events reported?
hint: Indicate if the subject experienced any medical conditions or events. If yes, include the appropriate details where indicated on the CRF.

name: MH_MHSPID
label: MH Number
question_text: MH Number
hint: Number

name: MH_MHDAT
label: Collection Date
question_text: What was the date the medical history was collected?
hint: Record the date on which the Medical History was collected.

name: MH_MHTERM
label: Medical History Term
question_text: What is the medical condition or event term?
hint: Record all relevant medical conditions or events, as defined in the protocol. Record only 1 medical condition or event per line. Ensure that the medical conditions or events listed on the Medical History page do not meet any of the exclusion criteria.

name: MH_MHSTDAT
label: Start Date
question_text: What [is/was] the [medical event or condition/category of the event] start date?
hint: Record the start date of the medical event or condition.

name: MH_MHONGO
label: Ongoing
question_text: Is the medical condition or event ongoing (as of the [study-specific timepoint or period])?
hint: Record the medical condition or event as ongoing ("Y") if it has not ended at the time of data collection.

name: MH_MHENDAT
label: End Date
question_text: What[is/was] the[medical event or condition/category of the event] end date?
hint: Record the end date of the medical event or condition.

name: MHENDATSPACER
label: .
question_text: .

name: DM_BRTHDAT
label: Birth Date
question_text: What is the subject's date of birth?
hint: Record the date of birth to the level of precision known (e.g., day/month/year, year, month/year, etc.).

name: DM_AGE
label: Age
question_text: What is the subject's age?
hint: Record age of the subject.

name: DM_AGEU
label: What is the age unit used?
question_text: What is the age unit used?
hint: Record the appropriate age unit (e.g., YEARS, MONTHS, WEEKS, etc.).

name: DM_SEX
label: Sex
question_text: What is the sex of the subject?
hint: Record the appropriate sex.

name: DM_ETHNIC
label: Ethnicity
question_text: Do you consider yourself Hispanic/Latino or not Hispanic/Latino?
hint: Study participants should self-report ethnicity, with ethnicity being asked about before race.

name: DM_RACE
label: Race (more than one choice is acceptable)
question_text: Which of the following five racial designations best describes you? (More than one choice is acceptable.)
hint: Study participants should self-report race, with race being asked about after ethnicity.

name: DM_RACEOTH
label: Specify Other Race
question_text: What was the other race?
hint: If none of the pre-printed values for RACE are applicable or if another, unprinted selection should be added to those pre-printed values, record the value in this free text field.

name: VS_HORIZONTAL_VSPERF
label: Were vital signs performed?
question_text: Were vital signs performed?
hint: Indicate if the vital signs were collected. If yes, include the appropriate details where indicated on the CRF.

name: VS_HORIZONTAL_VSDAT
label: Date
question_text: What was the date of the measurement(s)?
hint: Record date of measurements.

name: VS_HORIZONTAL_SYSBP_VSORRES
label: Systolic Blood Pressure
question_text: What was the result of the Systolic Blood Pressure measurement?
hint: Record the vital sign results.

name: VS_HORIZONTAL_SYSBP_VSORRESU
label: Systolic Blood Pressure Unit
question_text: What was the unit of the Systolic Blood Pressure measurement?
hint: Record or select the original unit in which these data were collected, if not preprinted on CRF.

name: VS_HORIZONTAL_DIABP_VSORRES
label: Diastolic Blood Pressure
question_text: What was the result of the Diastolic Blood Pressure measurement?
hint: Record the vital sign results.

name: VS_HORIZONTAL_DIABP_VSORRESU
label: Diastolic Blood Pressure Unit
question_text: What was the unit of the Diastolic Blood Pressure measurement?
hint: Record or select the original unit in which these data were collected, if not preprinted on CRF.

name: VS_HORIZONTAL_BP_VSPOS
label: Blood Pressure Position
question_text: What was the position of the subject during the blood pressure measurement?
hint: Record the position of subject at time of test (e.g. SITTING).

name: VS_HORIZONTAL_BP_VSLOC
label: Blood Pressure Location
question_text: What was the anatomical location where the blood pressure measurement was taken?
hint: Record or select location on body where measurement was performed, if not preprinted on CRF.

name: VS_HORIZONTAL_HEIGHT_VSORRES
label: Height
question_text: What was the result of the height measurement?
hint: Record the vital sign results.

name: VS_HORIZONTAL_HEIGHT_VSORRESU
label: Height Unit
question_text: What was the unit of the height measurement?
hint: Record or select the original unit in which these data were collected, if not preprinted on CRF.

name: VS_HORIZONTAL_WEIGHT_VSORRES
label: Weight
question_text: What was the result of the weight measurement?
hint: Record the vital sign results.

name: VS_HORIZONTAL_WEIGHT_VSORRESU
label: Weight Unit
question_text: What was the unit of the weight measurement?
hint: Record or select the original unit in which these data were collected, if not preprinted on CRF.

name: VS_HORIZONTAL_PULSE_VSORRES
label: Pulse
question_text: What was the result of the pulse measurement?
hint: Record the vital sign results.

name: VS_HORIZONTAL_PULSE_VSORRESU
label: Pulse Unit
question_text: What was the unit of the pulse measurement?
hint: Record or select the original unit in which these data were collected, if not preprinted on CRF.

name: VS_HORIZONTAL_PULSE_VSLOC
label: Pulse Location
question_text: What was the anatomical location where the pulse measurement was taken?
hint: Record or select location on body where measurement was performed, if not preprinted on CRF.

name: VS_HORIZONTAL_RESP_VSORRES
label: Respiratory Rate
question_text: What was the result of the respiratory rate measurement?
hint: Record the vital sign results.

name: VS_HORIZONTAL_RESP_VSORRESU
label: Respiratory Rate Unit
question_text: What was the unit of the Respiratory Rate Unit measurement?
hint: Record or select the original unit in which these data were collected, if not preprinted on CRF.

name: VS_HORIZONTAL_TEMP_VSORRES
label: Temperature
question_text: What was the result of the temperature measurement?
hint: Record the vital sign results.

name: VS_HORIZONTAL_TEMP_VSORRESU
label: Temperature Unit
question_text: What was the unit of the Temperature Unit measurement?
hint: Record or select the original unit in which these data were collected, if not preprinted on CRF.

name: VS_HORIZONTAL_TEMP_VSLOC
label: Temperature Location
question_text: What was the anatomical location where the temperature was taken?
hint: Record or select location on body where measurement was performed, if not preprinted on CRF.

name: LB_CENTRAL_LBCAT
label: Lab Panel Name
question_text: Lab Panel Name
hint: Record the lab test category, if not preprinted on the CRF.

name: LB_CENTRAL_LBPERF
label: Was the sample collected?
question_text: Was the sample collected?
hint: Indicate whether or not lab specimen was collected or measurement performed.

name: LB_CENTRAL_LBDAT
label: Collection Date
question_text: Collection Date
hint: Record the date when specimen collection was done.

name: LB_CENTRAL_LBTIM
label: Collection Time
question_text: Collection Time
hint: Record time of collection (as complete as possible).

name: PE_PEPERF
label: Was the physical examination performed?
question_text: Was the physical examination performed?
hint: If physical examination was performed as planned then select Yes, otherwise, select No.

name: PE_PEDAT
label: Exam Date
question_text: What was the date of the physical examination?
hint: Record complete date of examination.

name: PE_NOTE1
label: If the physical finding/abnormality started prior to [protocol-specific time period], then it must be recorded as Medical History.
question_text: If the physical finding/abnormality started prior to [protocol-specific time period], then it must be recorded as Medical History.

name: PE_NOTE2
label: If the physical finding/abnormality started after [protocol-specific time period], it must be recorded as an Adverse Event.
question_text: If the physical finding/abnormality started after [protocol-specific time period], it must be recorded as an Adverse Event.

name: EG_CENTRAL_EGPERF
label: Was an ECG performed?
question_text: Was an ECG performed?
hint: Indicate whether or not an ECG or specific ECG test was done.

name: EG_CENTRAL_EGREFID
label: ECG Reference Identifier/Accession Number
question_text: What was the (ECG) [reference identifier/accession number]?
hint: Record the identifier number assigned.

name: EG_CENTRAL_EGMETHOD
label: Method
question_text: What was the method used for the ECG?
hint: Record the method used for the ECG.

name: EG_CENTRAL_EGPOS
label: Position
question_text: What was the position of the subject during the ECG measurement?
hint: Record the position of the subject during the ECG.

name: EG_CENTRAL_EGDAT
label: Date
question_text: What was the date of the ECG?
hint: Record the date the ECG was done.

name: IE_IEYN
label: Were all eligibility criteria met?
question_text: Were all eligibility criteria met?
hint: Record Yes if all eligibility criteria were met at the time the subject was enrolled. Record No if subject did not meet all criteria at the time the subject was enrolled.

name: IE_IEDAT
label: What was the date the eligibility criteria assessment was performed?
question_text: What was the date the eligibility criteria assessment was performed?
hint: Record complete date when the eligibility assessment was performed.

name: IE_IECAT
label: What was the category of the criterion?
question_text: What was the category of the criterion?
hint: Record whether the criterion exception was Inclusion or Exclusion.

name: IE_IETESTCD
label: What was the identifier of the inclusion criterion the subject did not meet or the exclusion criterion the subject met?
question_text: What was the identifier of the inclusion criterion the subject did not meet or the exclusion criterion the subject met?
hint: If the subject was not eligible, Record the identifying code for each criterion that was an exception.

name: IE_IEORRES
label: What is the result?
question_text: What is the result?

name: DS_DSDECOD
label: What was the subject's status at the end of the study?
question_text: What was the subject's status at the end of the study?
hint: Document the subject's status at [insert text corresponding to the selected trial epoch/study specific time frame]. If the subject discontinued prematurely, record the primary reason for discontinuation.

name: DS_DSTERM
label: Specify
question_text: What was the subject's status?; If [DSDECOD], specify
hint: If Other is selected from the Status list, provide the verbatim reason.

name: DS_DSSTDAT
label: What was the study discontinuation or completion date?
question_text: What was the study discontinuation or completion date?
hint: Record the date of [protocol milestone/disposition event] as defined in the protocol and/or CRF Completion Instructions.

name: EC_ECREFID
label: Study Treatment Label Identifier
question_text: Study Treatment Label Identifier
hint: Record treatment label identifier.

name: EC_ECSTDAT
label: Start Date
question_text: Start Date
hint: Record the start date of the study treatment administration.

name: EC_ECENDAT
label: End Date
question_text: End Date
hint: Record the end date of the study treatment administration.

name: EC_ECDSTXT
label: Dose
question_text: Dose
hint: Record the dose or amount of study treatment that was administered to/taken by the subject in the period recorded; from the start date/time to the end date/time inclusive.

name: EC_ECDOSU
label: Units
question_text: Units
hint: Record the unit of dose or amount taken per period recorded (e.g., ng, mg, mg/kg).

name: EC_ECDOSFRQ
label: Frequency
question_text: Frequency
hint: Record the frequency the study treatment was administered for a defined period of time (e.g., BID, QID, TID).

name: EC_ECROUTE
label: Route
question_text: Route
hint: Record the route of administration (e.g., IV, ORAL, TRANSDERMAL) or enter the appropriate code from the code list.

name: EC_ECDOSADJ
label: Was the dose adjusted?
question_text: Was the dose adjusted?
hint: Select either Yes or No to indicate whether there was a change in dosing.

name: EC_ECADJ
label: What was the reason the dose was adjusted?
question_text: What was the reason the dose was adjusted?
hint: If there was a change in dosing, record the reason for change.

name: EC_ECITRPYN
label: Was the study treatment interrupted?
question_text: Was the study treatment interrupted?
hint: Record if there was an interruption in the study treatment or dosing.

name: EC_ECCINTD
label: What was the duration of the treatment interruption?
question_text: What was the duration of the treatment interruption?
hint: Record the duration of treatment interruption.

name: EC_ECCINTDU
label: What was the interruption duration unit?
question_text: What was the interruption duration unit?
hint: Record the unit (e.g., MINUTES, HOURS, DAYS) for the duration of treatment interruption.

name: EC_ECTRTCMP
label: Did the subject complete the full course of study treatment?
question_text: Did the subject complete the full course of study treatment?
hint: Select either Yes or No to indicate whether subject has completed the full course of treatment.

name: DA_VERTICAL_DAPERF
label: Drug Accountability Performed
question_text: Drug Accountability Performed
hint: Indicate whether or not drug accountability was performed.

name: DA_VERTICAL_DADAT
label: Date
question_text: Date
hint: Record the date drug accountability was performed.

name: DA_VERTICAL_DAREFID
label: Treatment Label Identifier
question_text: Treatment Label Identifier
hint: Record dispensed treatment label identifier.

name: DA_VERTICAL_DATEST
label: What is the drug accountability being assessed?
question_text: What is the drug accountability being assessed?

name: DA_VERTICAL_DAORRES
label: Amount
question_text: Amount
hint: Record the result of the drug accountability assessment.

name: DA_VERTICAL_DAORRESU
label: Unit
question_text: Unit
hint: Record or select the original units in which these data were collected, if not preprinted on CRF.

name: DD_DDYN
label: Were any death detail assessments collected?
question_text: Were any death detail assessments collected?
hint: Indicate if the death details are known. If yes, include the appropriate details where indicated on the CRF.

name: DD_DDDAT
label: Collection Date
question_text: What was the date [DTHDX] assessment was collected?
hint: Record the date of collection.

name: DD_DTHDAT
label: Death Date
question_text: What [is/was] the subject's date of death?
hint: Record the date of death.

name: DD_PRCDTH_DDORRES
label: What was the primary cause of death?
question_text: What was the primary cause of death?
hint: Record the primary cause of death.

name: DD_AUTOPIND_DDORRES
label: Was an autopsy performed?
question_text: Was an autopsy performed?
